carrot.name: Carrot
carrot.lore: A generous, fast-growing starter crop. Freshly pulled bunches smell of damp morning soil. Perfect for finding your bearings on the farm.

wheat.name: Wheat
wheat.lore: Golden stalks sway gently in the breeze. A staple of the family kitchen, wheat is a reliable fill for the silos and feeds everyone at the table.

potato.name: Potato
potato.lore: Hardy and forgiving, the potato doesn't hold grudges when you forget about it. You'll always pull something from the soil — a favorite of apprentice gardeners.

beetroot.name: Beetroot
beetroot.lore: Its deep purple heart stains hands and aprons. Beetroot loves cool seasons and rewards patient growers with an earthy intensity.

tomato.name: Tomato
tomato.lore: Fragrant and sun-soaked, the tomato asks for a little more care but repays every effort. A ripe tomato is already a meal.

cabbage.name: Cabbage
cabbage.lore: Dense, heavy, almost architectural in its roundness. Cabbage gives structure to the garden and keeps its freshness long after harvest.

cucumber.name: Cucumber
cucumber.lore: A willing climber, the cucumber grips anything it finds. Crisp and refreshing, it promises the coolest summer afternoons.

corn.name: Corn
corn.lore: Tall stalks form corridors where the wind whispers. Slow to mature, corn demands space but delivers spectacular harvests.

strawberry.name: Strawberry
strawberry.lore: Tiny sugar bombs tucked under the leaves. Strawberries often vanish before they reach the basket — a mystery no one really owns up to.

pumpkin.name: Pumpkin
pumpkin.lore: Queen of autumn, the pumpkin swells slowly until it reaches startling proportions. A fine specimen is the pride of an entire season.

sunflower.name: Sunflower
sunflower.lore: A solar giant that follows the light from morning to night. Unlocked by advanced research, it crowns the fields in a wave of living gold.

orchidee.name: Mysterious Orchid
orchidee.lore: You don't plant an orchid: it chooses its moment. It sometimes appears at the edge of a harvest, an unexpected gift from generous soil. Its cool petal holds an almost unreal shimmer.

rose_doree.name: Golden Rose
rose_doree.lore: A gardening legend. A few petals can light up an entire orchard. The golden rose only surfaces when older crops are harvested patiently — and even then, it has to be earned.

truffe.name: Fragrant Truffle
truffe.lore: Hidden beneath majestic roots, the truffle only reveals itself to persistent farmers. Its powerful aroma signs the finest feast dishes.

fruit_dragon.name: Dragon Fruit
fruit_dragon.lore: The ultimate treasure of the farm, its scaled skin seems to pulse with an inner glow. It's said that a single one can appear after any harvest — but most gardeners will only see it once in a lifetime.

poussin.name: Chick
poussin.lore: A yellow ball of fluff that chirps at anything. First resident of the farm, it sets the tone for a happy, slightly chaotic yard.

poulet.name: Chicken
poulet.lore: A tireless scratcher, always inspecting every blade of grass. Its presence turns the smallest patch of soil into a tiny kingdom.

canard.name: Duck
canard.lore: Clumsy on land, sovereign on water. It loves morning puddles and eyes the damp plots with a hungry interest.

cochon.name: Pig
cochon.lore: Clever, curious, far smarter than it looks. A well-settled pig quickly becomes a pillar of daily farm life.

vache.name: Cow
vache.lore: A calm presence that anchors the landscape. When a cow moves in, the farm suddenly feels more real, more complete.

oiseau.name: Bird
oiseau.lore: A small visitor from the sky choosing its stops. Its dawn song signals a healthy farm where the trees make it want to stay.

ecureuil.name: Squirrel
ecureuil.lore: A russet tightrope walker slipping through branches. Always hiding something somewhere — and always forgetting where.

papillons.name: Butterflies
papillons.lore: A colorful cloud dancing over the flower beds. Their presence hints at a garden in balance, welcoming to wild life.

coccinelle.name: Ladybug
coccinelle.lore: A tiny red guardian with black dots. Said to bring luck, experienced gardeners leave her alone on the leaves.

chat.name: Cat
chat.lore: Discreet ruler of the barns and windowsills. She comes when she wants, leaves when she wants, and truly belongs to no one.

hibou.name: Owl
hibou.lore: Silent sentinel of farm nights. When it perches on a main branch, you feel the grounds have a nightly guardian.

fee.name: Fairy
fee.lore: A shimmering presence that only appears on the most flourishing farms. You catch her from the corner of your eye, never head-on — as if she refused to be truly seen.

dragon.name: Dragon
dragon.lore: A legendary creature whose arrival changes the atmosphere of the entire farm. Other residents look at him with a mix of awe and respect.

phoenix.name: Phoenix
phoenix.lore: A fire bird whose plumage seems to dance on the edge of ignition. His presence rewards farms that have weathered many seasons.

licorne.name: Unicorn
licorne.lore: A myth turned creature, a whiteness that seems to reflect the evening light. She only appears on the most accomplished farms, like a consecration.

esprit_eau.name: Water Spirit
esprit_eau.lore: A translucent silhouette glimpsed near bodies of water, on certain evenings. Those who've crossed its path keep quiet about the circumstances — it's said to reveal itself through a particular adventure.

ancien_gardien.name: Ancient Guardian
ancien_gardien.lore: A thousand-year-old presence draped in greenery, a rare companion to the farm's great stories. You don't meet him by accident: he's the key to a tale that must be earned.

poulailler.name: Chicken coop
poulailler.lore: The most accessible of the farm's buildings, home to a few busy hens that lay at steady intervals. Their eggs power many comforting recipes and provide a reliable stream of coins from day one. Each upgrade shortens the laying cycle to keep up with the family's growing appetite.

grange.name: Barn
grange.lore: A sturdy wooden barn where the farm's dairy quietly matures. Its creamy milk turns into cheese, gratins and hearty soups, becoming essential as soon as the tree reaches the sapling stage. Upgrading the barn shortens the delay between collections to feed the more ambitious recipes.

moulin.name: Windmill
moulin.lore: The windmill's great sails spin with the seasons, grinding wheat into tender flour. Essential for bread, cakes and the most elaborate pies, it marks the farm's passage to the adult-tree recipes. Upgrades speed up production to match the kitchen's growing demands.

ruche.name: Beehive
ruche.lore: A golden colony of industrious bees gathers nectar from the crops to produce precious honey. The hive only unlocks with an advanced livestock tech and then becomes the cornerstone of noble recipes like mead or royal jam. Its upgrades increase the throughput of stored honey jars.

soupe.name: Soup
soupe.lore: A rustic soup that opens the recipe book as soon as the sapling stage begins. It combines the farm's most accessible root vegetables and brings a little warmth to the early days of play. Perfect for turning the first harvest surpluses into coins.

bouquet.name: Garden bouquet
bouquet.lore: A colourful assembly of leafy vegetables, as decorative as it is profitable. Available very early, it makes good use of surplus crops without tapping animal resources. A small ritual to celebrate a generous harvest.

crepe.name: Crepe
crepe.lore: The quintessential bridge between the garden and the coop. One fresh egg, a handful of wheat, and the farm enters the era of crop/building crossover recipes. A perfect way to test the workshop's first synergies.

bortsch.name: Borscht
bortsch.lore: A steaming borscht made from the farm's beets, straight out of a traditional family kitchen. It lets you clear beet stockpiles without relying on other crops. Simple, nourishing and available from the sapling stage.

fromage.name: Cheese
fromage.lore: An aged cheese born from milk patiently collected at the barn. It ushers in the era of pure building-based recipes and becomes an excellent way to monetise dairy output. Selling it easily funds the next batch of upgrades.

gratin.name: Gratin
gratin.lore: A comforting gratin blending barn milk, garden potatoes and coop eggs. It's the first three-ingredient crossover recipe, a perfect milestone for the young-tree stage. A family classic that's always welcome.

omelette.name: Omelette
omelette.lore: A golden omelette combining coop eggs and garden tomatoes. It leverages the abundant resources of the early-to-mid game and stays profitable throughout the progression. A reliable staple of the workshop.

hydromel.name: Mead
hydromel.lore: An amber drink brewed from the beehive's honey, a symbol of the farm's prestige. As soon as the hive is active, mead becomes one of the first high-value recipes. A beverage that commands the respect of travellers.

nougat.name: Nougat
nougat.lore: A smooth nougat blending three building resources: honey, egg and flour. It rewards farms that have diversified their production with an excellent return on investment. A treat that smells of late afternoon.

pain_epices.name: Gingerbread
pain_epices.lore: A soft honey-flavoured gingerbread baked with fresh windmill flour. It taps directly into the windmill + beehive synergy and becomes a flagship recipe from the young-tree stage on. Perfect for small virtual family snacks.

parfum_orchidee.name: Orchid perfume
parfum_orchidee.lore: A rare vial distilled from carefully grown orchids with a touch of honey. It's one of the first recipes to make use of a rare seed, with an exceptional sale value as a reward. A luxury reserved for patient farms.

gaspacho.name: Gazpacho
gaspacho.lore: A fresh cucumber-and-tomato gazpacho, perfect for clearing two abundant summer crops. No building ingredient is required, so it stays accessible even without a hive or windmill. A simple recipe that often saves the day.

pain.name: Bread
pain.lore: The windmill's crusty bread, the emblematic recipe of the adult-tree stage. Flour and wheat come together as a food staple the family eats without ever tiring of it. A safe bet when rare ingredients run short.

confiture.name: Strawberry jam
confiture.lore: A deep-red jam that captures the taste of summer strawberries. No building needed: the recipe turns the garden harvest directly into precious jars. Ideal for farms that favour sweet crops.

popcorn.name: Popcorn
popcorn.lore: Corn kernels burst into a golden avalanche, perfect for movie nights. The recipe makes use of the cornfields that ripen at the adult-tree stage. A simple pleasure that never fails.

huile_tournesol.name: Sunflower oil
huile_tournesol.lore: A cold-pressed oil made from sunflowers grown late in the progression. It unlocks a new layer of yields for farms that have invested in the culture branch. A versatile, highly sought-after ingredient.

brioche_tournesol.name: Sunflower brioche
brioche_tournesol.lore: A soft brioche sprinkled with sunflower seeds, combining windmill flour and floral harvest. It marries two pillars of the advanced farm into a comforting result. A pastry both rustic and refined.

gateau.name: Cake
gateau.lore: A classic birthday cake with flour, eggs and strawberries. A versatile adult-tree recipe, it balances buildings and crops for a generous result. Always welcome to celebrate a progression milestone.

confiture_royale.name: Royal jam
confiture_royale.lore: An exceptional jam made with golden rose, strawberry and honey, worthy of the finest tables. It's one of the most lucrative recipes in the game, reserved for farms that have already picked a rare floral seed. A true sweet masterpiece.

soupe_citrouille.name: Pumpkin soup
soupe_citrouille.lore: A creamy velouté celebrating the arrival of pumpkins at the majestic stage. Barn milk and pumpkin flesh unite for an unforgettable autumn recipe. The signal that the farm has finally come of age.

tarte_citrouille.name: Pumpkin pie
tarte_citrouille.lore: A golden pumpkin pie, refined cousin of the soup of the same name. It combines windmill flour, coop eggs and pumpkin flesh for a signature end-game dessert. A must-have for family celebrations.

risotto_truffe.name: Truffle risotto
risotto_truffe.lore: A creamy risotto elevated by a precious truffle from a rare seed. Milk and flour round out the star ingredient in one of the most valuable recipes in the game. A culinary pinnacle for patient farmers.

elixir_dragon.name: Dragon elixir
elixir_dragon.lore: A crimson elixir brewed from dragon fruit and a hint of honey. A prestige recipe unlocked at the adult-tree stage, it offers great returns for those who can grow legendary crops. A drink full of mystery.

galette_royale.name: Royal galette
galette_royale.lore: A puff-pastry galette unlocked through the farm's cooperative quests. Flour, egg and honey come together in a recipe that symbolises family teamwork. It only unlocks after completing a dedicated quest.

tarte_carottes.name: Carrot tart
tarte_carottes.lore: A golden tart that showcases spring carrots, enhanced by mill flour and a coop egg. Perfect for using up abundant spring harvests at the tree stage. A rustic dessert that celebrates the return of sunny days.

veloute_printanier.name: Spring velouté
veloute_printanier.lore: A smooth velouté pairing fresh cabbage, potato and barn milk. A spring recipe of the tree stage that valorises two seasonal crops in a comforting dish. Perfect for the crisp evenings of early spring.

gratin_hiver.name: Winter gratin
gratin_hiver.lore: A generous gratin of potatoes and cabbage, browned with barn milk. The signature winter recipe at the tree stage, it turns storage crops into a warming dish. The comfort of family cooking under the snow.

mijote_hiver.name: Winter stew
mijote_hiver.lore: A rustic stew of beetroot and potato, bound together by a coop egg. A winter recipe that makes the most of root vegetables stored in the cellar after the autumn harvest. The taste of a farm that endures winter without faltering.

culture-1.name: Organic fertiliser
culture-1.lore: The first technology of the culture branch. Natural amendment practices that accelerate every growth cycle, reducing the number of tasks needed for each plant to thrive. An essential entry point for any serious farm.

culture-2.name: Seed selection
culture-2.lore: A key step that teaches you to spot the best seeds in every harvest. This careful selection increases the chance of a bonus yield at harvest time. The art of watching the fields finally takes on its full meaning.

culture-3.name: Sunflower farming
culture-3.lore: The discovery of a solar crop previously out of reach: the sunflower. Once this technology is unlocked, new recipes and resources become available to the farm. A decorative and productive turning point.

culture-4.name: Botanical mastery
culture-4.lore: The pinnacle of the culture branch. The farm reaches a level of agricultural refinement that maximises bonus harvests on every pick. The fields almost seem eager to double their treasures.

elevage-1.name: Enriched feed
elevage-1.lore: Improved rations for the animals in the productive buildings. Their output speeds up noticeably and makes time away from the farm much more rewarding. The first step toward modern livestock care.

elevage-2.name: Improved storage
elevage-2.lore: New silos and pantries let buildings accumulate more resources before saturating. Ideal for spaced-out sessions where the farm keeps producing on its own. Organisation always pays off.

elevage-3.name: Beekeeping
elevage-3.lore: Mastery of bees and the construction of the hive. This technology unlocks an entirely new resource — honey — and paves the way for the noblest recipes. A major leap in the progression.

expansion-1.name: Solid foundations
expansion-1.lore: The farm learns to lay better foundations for its constructions. An extra building plot appears, enabling diversified production. The gateway to a multi-building farm.

expansion-2.name: Land clearing
expansion-2.lore: A major clearing project opens several new crop plots at once. The fields expand and the farm's horizon widens noticeably. The moment when the farm truly stretches out.

expansion-3.name: Giant plot
expansion-3.lore: The culmination of the expansion branch: an extra-large plot appears on the farm. It allows for majestic plants that could never have grown elsewhere. A privilege for accomplished farms.

chat.name: Cat
chat.lore: The cat is one of the three initial companions, chosen by players who appreciate its velvet independence. It watches the farm with a mocking eye but deeply loves its human family. Its ironic comments punctuate daily play sessions.

chien.name: Dog
chien.lore: The most enthusiastic companion of the initial trio. Loyal and protective, it celebrates every completed task as a great feat and never misses a chance to cheer the family on. An ally bursting with daily energy.

lapin.name: Rabbit
lapin.lore: A gentle companion available from the start. Quiet and thoughtful, it happily speaks of seasons, gardens and the farm's little joys. Perfect for farmers seeking a soothing presence.

renard.name: Fox
renard.lore: A rare species unlocked only through a lucky loot box. Cunning and strategic, the fox shares its tricks and notices details other companions miss. An observant ally for tactical farmers.

herisson.name: Hedgehog
herisson.lore: The rarest species, classified as epic and reserved for the most generous loot boxes. Wise and philosophical, the hedgehog shares little life maxims on patience and contemplation. A thoughtful companion that rewards collectors.

golden_crop.name: Golden Mutation
golden_crop.lore: At planting time, a seed can mutate into a golden version — a tiny chance that turns the harvest into an event. A golden crop yields a heavily multiplied reward. The exact probability and multiplier values are defined by the farm engine (GOLDEN_CROP_CHANCE and GOLDEN_HARVEST_MULTIPLIER): the documentation lives in the code, not in the lore.

harvest_insectes.name: Insect Swarm
harvest_insectes.lore: Sometimes, at harvest, a swarm of insects descends on the plot and devours part of the fruit of your labor. It's brutal, but it's part of the risks of a living farm.

harvest_pluie_doree.name: Golden Rain
harvest_pluie_doree.lore: A rare and beautiful event that may occur at harvest: a shower of golden light that strongly multiplies the harvested quantity. It's one of the finest gifts the farm can offer, and one of the mechanics the codex explicitly documents (CODEX-04).

harvest_mutation_rare.name: Rare Mutation
harvest_mutation_rare.lore: Sometimes a crop ripens with unusual colors, the sign of a rare mutation. The harvest is then increased, like a reward for those who take care of their plots.

seed_orchidee.name: Mysterious Orchid Seed
seed_orchidee.lore: A violet petal found in the middle of a ripe harvest. Some specific crops can, very rarely, produce this precious seed. You can't buy it anywhere: it's only earned through patient farming.

seed_rose_doree.name: Golden Rose Seed
seed_rose_doree.lore: A golden gleam shining at the bottom of the basket. Only a few mature and sufficiently advanced crops can yield this mythical seed — and even then, luck stays modest.

seed_truffe.name: Truffle Spore
seed_truffe.lore: A powerful, dark scent escaping from a generous harvest. The truffle spore only appears from very specific, mature crops, like a reward for farmers thinking long-term.

seed_fruit_dragon.name: Dragon Fruit Seed
seed_fruit_dragon.lore: One of the rarest finds on the farm: a scaled seed that seems to reflect every light at once. Unlike the other drop seeds, it can appear from any harvest — but its probability is the lowest of all.

nouvel-an.name: New Year
nouvel-an.lore: The farm glows with lanterns and whispered wishes. The inhabitants gather around the great tree to welcome the cycle that begins. A scent of luck floats between the sleeping crops.

st-valentin.name: Valentine's Day
st-valentin.lore: Pink petals drift above the plots and the animals grow tenderly close. The harvests take on an almost complicit hue, as if celebrating the bonds that keep the farm alive.

poisson-avril.name: April Fool's
poisson-avril.lore: The wind carries small pranks between the rows: moved tools, smiling scarecrows, disguised seeds. Nothing serious, just the farm allowing itself a wink at the new season.

paques.name: Easter
paques.lore: Colored eggs hide between the crops and the hedges. Passing children go on the hunt while the hens watch, half amused, half complicit. A morning when anything feels possible.

ete.name: Summer
ete.lore: The sun reigns over the farm and every crop grows a little faster. Evenings stretch out, harvests abound, and the earth radiates a warmth you'd want to keep all year long.

rentree.name: Back to School
rentree.lore: The air turns cooler and the farm reorganizes itself. You tidy up, plant for autumn, return to a calmer rhythm. A turning point between carefree days and quiet preparation.

halloween.name: Halloween
halloween.lore: The pumpkins take on mysterious faces and shadows dance near the tree. The farm becomes a playground between thrill and fairytale, where the strangest crops reveal their secrets.

noel.name: Christmas
noel.lore: A white blanket covers the farm and garlands cling to the buildings. The tree shines differently that night, as if watching over all the gifts laid at its feet.

voyageur_argent.name: The Silver Traveler
voyageur_argent.lore: A stranger in a shimmering cloak arrives near the farm, carrying stories from faraway places. Each of his choices steers the family's destiny down a different path. Who is he really, and what does he seek here?

source_cachee.name: The Hidden Spring
source_cachee.lore: Rumor speaks of a forgotten spring whose water blesses every crop it touches. The adventure pushes the family to search the farm's corners for its trace. The real treasure may not be the water itself.

carnaval_ombres.name: The Carnival of Shadows
carnaval_ombres.lore: When night falls, strange silhouettes dance between the crops and invite the family to follow them. An invisible festival unfolds alongside the waking world. Refusing the invitation might be a mistake.

graine_anciens.name: The Seed of the Ancients
graine_anciens.lore: Legend tells of an ancestral seed sleeping somewhere on the farm, ready to awaken forgotten powers. The quest demands patience and delicate choices. Whoever finds it will change the farm forever.

moisson_collective.name: Collective harvest
moisson_collective.lore: Harvest 25 crops together this week. Every harvest counts!

grand_defrichage.name: Great clearing
grand_defrichage.lore: Complete 120 family tasks in 14 days to unlock a new plot!

champions_defi.name: Challenge champions
champions_defi.lore: Complete 3 family challenges in 14 days to earn rare seeds.

artisans_familiaux.name: Family crafters
artisans_familiaux.lore: Craft 5 items together to unlock the royal cake recipe.

graines_dorees.name: Golden seeds
graines_dorees.lore: Plant 15 crops together in 7 days to trigger 48h of golden rain!

semaine_production.name: Production week
semaine_production.lore: Collect 30 building resources this week for a 48h production boost.

pluie_magique.name: Magic rain
pluie_magique.lore: Complete 30 tasks in 5 days to trigger 24h of magic rain on the farm.

tresor_ecureuil.name: The Squirrel's Treasure
tresor_ecureuil.lore: A restless squirrel scurries around a tree, frantically scratching the bark. It seems to have hidden something important but can't quite remember where. Should you dig with it or leave it to its mysteries?

tempete.name: The Storm
tempete.lore: The sky suddenly darkens and the first lightning bolts streak the horizon. You must choose between sheltering the farm quickly or letting the rain feed the thirstiest crops. Every option has its price.

voyageur.name: The Unknown Traveler
voyageur.lore: A weary stranger knocks at the farm's door and asks for shelter for the night. His story is strange, his belongings stranger still. Welcoming him may open a precious friendship or invite trouble.

lucioles.name: The Dance of Fireflies
lucioles.lore: A swarm of fireflies fills the farm at dusk, drawing almost deliberate patterns in the air. Should you simply admire them or try to capture the moment? Their magic is fragile.

graine_magique.name: The Magic Seed
graine_magique.lore: A strange seed, warm to the touch, appears in a corner of the farm. Planting it could grow a wonder or keeping it as a gift could delight someone. Its potential remains a mystery.

arc_en_ciel.name: The Rainbow
arc_en_ciel.lore: After a brief rain, a dazzling rainbow links the farm to the distance. They say it reveals something to those who truly take the time to look. Painting, legend, or just a fleeting moment?

hibou_sage.name: The Wise Owl
hibou_sage.lore: An old owl perches on the great tree and fixes the family with its round eyes. It seems to want to trade wisdom for comfort. Is its counsel worth a shared biscuit?

tresor_pirate.name: The Pirate's Treasure
tresor_pirate.lore: A worn map surfaces from beneath a woodpile, marked with a suspicious cross. Digging there might reveal an old stash or just be a trick of time. Adventure beckons, but the ground is hard.

fee_egaree.name: The Lost Fairy
fee_egaree.lore: A tiny fairy has lost her way near the farm and searches for her path in distress. Helping her home may seal a quiet alliance. Her world remains invisible to the inattentive.

pluie_etoiles.name: The Starfall
pluie_etoiles.lore: One night, the sky tears open into a cascade of shooting stars above the farm. Making a wish or gathering the fallen dust — both options taste rare. No one will forget this night.

papillon_geant.name: The Giant Butterfly
papillon_geant.lore: A butterfly with oversized wings calmly lands on a crop, as if choosing its stage. Offer it a perch or just photograph it? Its arrival is a sign no one expected.

concert_oiseaux.name: The Bird Concert
concert_oiseaux.lore: One morning, all the birds of the farm synchronize in an almost orchestrated song. Listen in silence or join them in dance — the farm becomes a fleeting stage.

neige_magique.name: The Magic Snow
neige_magique.lore: A luminous snow falls on the farm in the heart of the night, without biting cold. You can shape figures with it or huddle by a fire and watch. A moment suspended in time.

champignon_dore.name: The Golden Mushroom
champignon_dore.lore: A mushroom the color of gold grows apart from the others, almost provocatively. Cook it or bring it to a sage? Its effects remain to be discovered and each choice seals its use.

lettre_mysterieuse.name: The Mysterious Letter
lettre_mysterieuse.lore: An envelope without a sender waits on the farm's wooden table. Open it or leave it sealed to preserve the mystery? The words inside could change everything.
